claim_scope: corrected K4096 uniform anchor only; two-budget results require their own measured rails

provenance.correction: L000/L001 rebuilt with checkpoint-bound codebooks; the poisoned 0.247 row is excluded

root_cause: The spark-8 K4096 builder checkpointed codes/scales and done masks but not the exact CUDA-Lloyd codebooks those codes indexed. L000 resumed after 80 experts and L001 after 176 experts; each resume refit different codebooks despite seed 0 (CUDA Lloyd atomics are run-dependent), then sealed mixed old-code/new-code planes under only the new codebooks. The rail decoder was correct, but faithfully decoded the early experts through the wrong LUT. A clean L000/L001 rebuild with codebooks persisted in partial checkpoints removes the first concrete divergence.
